x-form-note: This therapy type uses the identical Fisiozero clinical form as all other physiotherapy types. The form fields are defined in physiotherapy-v1.json. Therapy type is appointment metadata only (tipo_evento_dinamico = 'Campo - R.P.G.'), not a form selector. This file exists as a named entry point so the scheduler can associate the correct form template when booking a 'RPG' appointment.

_meta.source: Fisiozero production — confirmed by Claude browser agent extraction 2026-06-01. Fisiozero does not have separate forms per therapy type; all physio types share one form (op=av).
_meta.version_note: v1 — thin wrapper referencing physiotherapy-v1.json. No independent field list; see x-form-ref.
